accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and verified context: BLM ROD of April 25, 2022, GAO opinion, CRA disapproval, and legislative dates.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the CRA 'never took effect' explanation and BLM attribution are accurate context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution disapproves and nullifies the BLM record of decision under the Congressional Review Act.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly identifies that the resolution nullifies the BLM rule under chapter 8 of title 5 (the CRA).

exceptions_conditions.why: The bill contains no material exceptions or conditions beyond the disapproval itself.

effective_dates.why: Accurately reports the Senate, House, and approval dates of October 30, November 18, and December 5, 2025.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the essential operative effect that the rule shall have no force or effect.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and descriptive with no advocacy or editorializing.

coherent.why: The summary is well-organized, consistent, and clearly written.

concise.why: The summary is appropriately concise without padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: BLM, GAO, the Congressional Review Act, and the cited record of decision are all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: All dates stated (April 25, 2022; July 24, 2025; legislative dates) match the bill text and record.
